name: browser-fetch
description: Securely fetch content from JavaScript-heavy websites using headless browser
author: SecureClaw

tools.name: browser_fetch
tools.description: Fetch content from a URL using headless browser (Playwright). Use for JavaScript-heavy sites like 1Password share links that require client-side decryption. **REQUIRES APPROVAL** - will request permission before opening any URL.

url.description: The URL to fetch (must be HTTPS)

waitForSelector.description: Optional CSS selector to wait for before extracting content
